overall.description: A first-person perspective scene from a sci-fi horror video game (The Callisto Protocol) showing a holographic video call with character Jacob Lee on a desk terminal. The player watches the call in a dimly lit, futuristic room with industrial aesthetics, then navigates to a data log interface. The footage features high-quality cinematic rendering with green-tinted holographic displays and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: private quarters with holographic communication terminal

events.description: character on holographic display leans forward closer to the camera
character raises hand in a waving gesture while speaking

agents.ego_description: stationary at desk, watching the holographic video call playback on the terminal

notable_agents.action: Jacob Lee speaking directly to camera with expressive facial movements and hand gestures

entered.detail: Large transparent holographic screen displaying the video call with timestamp counter
Two white cylindrical bottles with blue caps on the desk surface
Dark metallic desk with scattered papers and documents
Wall covered with papers, sticky notes, and pinned documents behind the hologram
Dark container holding pens and writing utensils

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a first-person view of a desk terminal in a dimly lit, industrial sci-fi room. A holographic display shows a video call with Jacob Lee, who speaks with increasing intensity, leaning forward and gesturing with his hand. Medical bottles and scattered papers sit on the desk while a bulletin board with notes is visible behind the transparent screen.

events.description: video call minimizes and data log menu interface overlays the screen with navigation tabs
player navigates to surveillance tab displaying green-tinted security camera thumbnails

agents.ego_description: navigating the terminal interface, switching between data log tabs and viewing surveillance footage

entered.detail: Digital UI with tabs for MESSAGES, COMMUNICATION, SPECIAL, and SURVEILLANCE
Grid of four green-tinted security camera feeds showing different locations

segments.scene_description: The video call interface transitions to a data log menu system with navigation tabs at the top. The player navigates through the interface, briefly viewing a text document before switching to the surveillance tab, which displays a grid of green-tinted security camera footage thumbnails. The medical bottles remain visible on the desk to the left throughout the transition.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that shifts from an intense holographic communication to the navigation of a digital archive. It begins focused on a desk terminal in a dimly lit industrial room, where a holographic projection of Jacob Lee speaks with increasing urgency, gesturing forward against a backdrop of a bulletin board and scattered papers. As the interaction concludes, the holographic interface seamlessly transitions into a data log menu system, while medical bottles on the desk remain visible to the left. The camera then navigates through the digital display, moving from a text document to a surveillance tab that reveals a grid of green-tinted security camera thumbnails.
